name: power-construct
short_effect: Transforms 10% or 50% Zygarde into Complete Forme when its HP is below 50%.
effect_text: Transforms 10% or 50% Zygarde into Complete Forme when its HP is below 50%.  This ability cannot be copied or replaced.  This ability only takes effect for Zygarde.
flavor_text: Other Cells gather to aid when its HP becomes half or less. Then the Pokémon changes its form to Complete Forme.
